/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/naleystogramm_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/core/identity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/core/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/core/storage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/core/filetransfer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/core/upnp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/crypto/e2e.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/crypto/x3dh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/crypto/ratchet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/ui/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/ui/thememanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/ui/chatwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/ui/contactswidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/core/updatechecker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/core/demomode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/core/sessionmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/ui/updatebanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/ui/settingspanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/ui/dialogs/addcontactdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naleystogramm.dir/src/ui/dialogs/incomingdialog.cpp.o -o naleystogramm  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Sql.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
